sentence: Hoje n茫o faz sol nem calor.
ipa: 藞蓴蕭e 藞n蓯虄w虄 藞fas 藞s蓴色 藞ne虄 k蓯藞l蓴r
gloss_en: Today it is neither sunny nor hot.
notes: Velarised coda [色] in 'sol' and open [蓴] per goncalves1996; alveolar rhotic [r] in coda 'calor' per ferraz1979.

sentence: O bilhete custa cem dobras.
ipa: 藞u bi藞蕩蓻te 藞kust蓯 藞se虄 藞d蓴br蓯s
gloss_en: The ticket costs a hundred dobras.
notes: Santomean currency 'dobra' per hagemeijer2009; palatal [蕩] in 'bilhete' and alveolar trill [r] in 'dobras' per ferraz1979.

sentence: Tenho consulta na quinta-feira 脿s nove horas.
ipa: 藞t蓻刹u ko虄藞su色t蓯 藞n蓯 藞ki虄t蓯 藞fejr蓯 藞as 藞n蓴ve 藞蓴r蓯s
gloss_en: I have an appointment on Thursday at nine.
notes: Palatal [刹] in 'tenho' and dark coda [色] in 'consulta' per goncalves1996; retained /ej/ in 'feira' and alveolar [r] in 'horas' per ferraz1979.

sentence: A minha fam铆lia mora numa ro莽a antiga.
ipa: 藞蓯 藞mi刹蓯 f蓯藞mili蓯 藞m蓴r蓯 藞num蓯 藞蕘蓴s蓯 蓯虄藞ti伞蓯
gloss_en: My family lives on an old plantation estate.
notes: Santomean lexicon 'ro莽a' (plantation estate) central to island life per hagemeijer2009; strong word-initial [蕘] in 'ro莽a' and palatal [刹] in 'minha' per ferraz1979.

sentence: Vira 脿 direita e segue sempre em frente.
ipa: 藞vir蓯 藞a di藞rejt蓯 藞e 藞s蓻伞e 藞se虄pre 藞e虄 藞fre虄te
gloss_en: Turn right and keep going straight ahead.
notes: Retained /ej/ in 'direita' and alveolar trill [r] in the 'fr' cluster of 'frente' per ferraz1979; imperative register per goncalves1996.

sentence: Este calulu est谩 muito bom com banana p茫o.
ipa: 藞este k蓯lu藞lu e藞sta 藞mujtu 藞bo虄 藞ko虄 b蓯藞nan蓯 藞p蓯虄w虄
gloss_en: This calulu is very good with plantain.
notes: Gulf-of-Guinea dish 'calulu' and 'banana p茫o' per hagemeijer2009; nasal diphthong [蓯虄w虄] in 'p茫o' and open nasal /o/ in 'bom' per goncalves1996.

sentence: Onde fica a praia mais perto?
ipa: 藞o虄de 藞fik蓯 藞蓯 藞praj蓯 藞majs 藞p蓻rtu
gloss_en: Where is the nearest beach?
notes: Alveolar trill [r] in 'perto', retained /ej/? no, open [蓻] in 'perto' per ferraz1979; interrogative register per goncalves1996.

sentence: Quantas dobras custa o peixe fresco?
ipa: 藞kw蓯虄t蓯s 藞d蓴br蓯s 藞kust蓯 藞u 藞pej蕛e 藞fr蓻sku
gloss_en: How many dobras does the fresh fish cost?
notes: Santomean currency 'dobra' per hagemeijer2009; nasal [蓯虄] in 'quantas', retained /ej/ in 'peixe' and alveolar trill [r] in 'fresco' per ferraz1979.

sentence: Se chovesse, fic谩vamos em casa.
ipa: 藞se 蕛o藞v蓻s毯e fi藞kav蓯mos 藞e虄 藞kas蓯
gloss_en: If it rained, we would stay home.
notes: [蕛] onset and open [蓻] in 'chovesse' per goncalves1996; conditional-imperfect frame; alveolar rhotic system per ferraz1979.

sentence: Ontem comprei safu no mercado.
ipa: 藞o虄te虄 ko虄藞prej s蓯藞fu 藞nu me藞rkadu
gloss_en: Yesterday I bought safu fruit at the market.
notes: Santomean fruit 'safu' per hagemeijer2009; retained /ej/ in 'comprei' and alveolar trill [r] in 'mercado' per ferraz1979.

sentence: Para o ano vou viajar at茅 ao Pr铆ncipe.
ipa: 藞par蓯 藞u 藞蓯nu 藞vo vi蓯藞蕭ar 蓯藞t蓻 藞蓯u 藞pri虄sipe
gloss_en: Next year I will travel to Principe.
notes: Santomean island name Principe per hagemeijer2009; open [蓻] in 'at茅', /o/ monophthong in 'vou'->[藞vo] and alveolar trill [r] in 'Pr铆ncipe' per ferraz1979.

sentence: Liga-me mais tarde, por favor.
ipa: 藞li伞蓯 藞me 藞majs 藞tarde 藞p蓴r f蓯藞v蓴r
gloss_en: Call me later, please.
notes: Open [蓴] in 'por'/'favor' and alveolar trill [r] in 'tarde' per ferraz1979; clitic imperative 'liga-me' per goncalves1996.

sentence: Ol谩, tudo leve-leve contigo?
ipa: o藞la 藞tudu 藞l蓻ve 藞l蓻ve ko虄藞ti伞u
gloss_en: Hello, are you taking it easy?
notes: Santomean catchphrase 'leve-leve' (easy does it), emblematic of the islands, per hagemeijer2009; open [蓻] in 'leve' and full vowels per goncalves1996.

sentence: Quem n茫o arrisca, n茫o petisca.
ipa: 藞ke虄 藞n蓯虄w虄 蓯藞risk蓯 藞n蓯虄w虄 pe藞tisk蓯
gloss_en: Nothing ventured, nothing gained.
notes: Alveolar trill [r] from 'rr' in 'arrisca' per ferraz1979; nasal diphthong [蓯虄w虄] in 'n茫o'; proverb register per goncalves1996.

sentence: O carro velho ficou na estrada molhada.
ipa: 藞u 藞karu 藞v蓻蕩u fi藞ko 藞n蓯 e藞strad蓯 mo藞蕩ad蓯
gloss_en: The old car ended up on the wet road.
notes: Alveolar trill [r] from 'rr' in 'carro' and palatal [蕩] in 'velho'/'molhada' per ferraz1979; retained /ou/->[o] in 'ficou' per goncalves1996.

sentence: Ele trouxe um ramo de flores roxas.
ipa: 藞ele 藞tro蕛e 藞u虄 藞蕘amu 藞de 藞fl蓴res 藞蕘蓴蕛蓯s
gloss_en: He brought a bunch of red flowers.
notes: Strong word-initial [蕘] in 'ramo'/'roxas' and 'ou' diphthong in 'trouxe' per ferraz1979; open [蓴] in 'roxas'/'flores' per goncalves1996.

sentence: Na gravana a terra fica seca e quente.
ipa: 藞n蓯 伞r蓯藞van蓯 藞蓯 藞t蓻r蓯 藞fik蓯 藞s蓻k蓯 藞e 藞ke虄te
gloss_en: In the dry season the land goes dry and hot.
notes: Santomean 'gravana' (dry season) per hagemeijer2009; alveolar trill [r] in 'terra', open [蓻] in 'terra'/'seca' per ferraz1979.

sentence: Aquele rapaz vende jornais na esquina.
ipa: 蓯藞k蓻le 蕘蓯藞pas 藞ve虄de 蕭o藞rnajs 藞n蓯 e藞skin蓯
gloss_en: That young man sells newspapers on the corner.
notes: Strong word-initial [蕘] in 'rapaz', open [蓻] in 'aquele' and alveolar [r] in 'jornais' per ferraz1979; register per goncalves1996.

sentence: O melhor cacau da ilha vem daquela ro莽a.
ipa: 藞u me藞蕩蓴r k蓯藞kaw 藞d蓯 藞i蕩蓯 藞ve虄 d蓯藞k蓻l蓯 藞蕘蓴s蓯
gloss_en: The island's best cocoa comes from that estate.
notes: Santomean 'ro莽a' (cocoa estate) and the island cocoa economy per hagemeijer2009; palatal [蕩] in 'ilha' and /aw/ in 'cacau' per ferraz1979.

sentence: Nunca vi um c茅u t茫o azul sobre o mar.
ipa: 藞nu虄k蓯 藞vi 藞u虄 s蓻藞u 藞t蓯虄w虄 蓯藞zu色 藞s蓴bre 藞u 藞mar
gloss_en: I never saw such a blue sky over the sea.
notes: Nasal diphthong [蓯虄w虄] in 't茫o', open [蓻] in 'c茅u' and dark coda [色] in 'azul' per goncalves1996; alveolar trill [r] in 'sobre'/'mar' per ferraz1979.
